arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Arsenal: Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea could climb to third in the Premier League with a win vs. Arsenal at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's stunning new-look starting XI after Guimaraes transfer and Partey exit
arts.sum: The Gunners are in need of additions across the pitch, but it is the engine room that is in need of changes despite the recent arrivals of Declan Rice and Mikel Merino. Given his Premier League experience, Guimaraes starting off in that role would be the expectation with Rice remaining further forward.

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi outlines transfer preference amid Chelsea interest and Tottenham bid
arts.sum: The 24-year-old has entered the final 18 months of his contract at Selhurst Park and there is an expectation that he is going to leave the club, unless he signs a new deal, in the summer transfer window. Liverpool are set to win the race to sign Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi, it has been claimed.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Premier League
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli's return to fitness should allow Mikel Arteta to field a more natural attack.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal host Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Why Raheem Sterling can't play for Arsenal against Chelsea
arts.sum: Why Arsenal forward Raheem Sterling is unable to play against Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Nico Williams 'advantage' revealed as Gunners 'enter talks' with Athletic Bilbao attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly enter discussions with Nico Williams's camp over a summer deal for the Athletic Bilbao attacker, who is also wanted by Barcelona and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Dario Essugo possible debut date revealed as 'medical completed' before £18.5m move
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly reach an agreement to sign Sporting Lisbon midfielder Dario Essugo in an £18.5m deal after already securing the signature of Geovany Quenda.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Moises Caicedo fires Arsenal warning as Cole Palmer message issued
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs CHELSEA: Enzo Maresca's Blues can move within three points of the Premier League title-chasing Gunners if they are to secure victory at the Emirates in Sunday's crunch London derby

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Riccardo Calafiori makes exciting Bukayo Saka claim as comeback edges closer
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs CHELSEA: Gunners left-back Riccardo Calafiori is targeting three points against the Blues but the Italian cannot wait to have star winger Bukayo Saka back in the fold with a Champions League quarter-final showdown with Real Madrid now on the horizon
